---
title: "People & Links"
aliases:
  - /home/students/
  - /home/links/
---

## Postdocs

- Dr. Ryoya Hiramatsu, 2026 - present
- Dr. Enda Xiao, 2023 – present
- Dr. Guangzong Xing, 2020–2022 (currently at NIMTE, China)

## Internship & Visiting Scholars
- [Prof. Arti Kashyap](https://faculty.iitmandi.ac.in/~arti/) (IIT Mandi): Jun. 2026 – Jul. 2026 (JST LOTUS)
- Deep Sagar (IIT Mandi): 2026 (JST LOTUS)
- Sakshi Goel (IIT Mandi): Jan. 2025 – Dec. 2025 (NIMS ICGP)
- Yixin Su (Tohoku Univ.): Apr. 2025
- Ryoma Asai (Univ. of Tokyo): Apr. 2025
- [Zan Yang](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=PK8qnrIAAAAJ&hl=en) (Science Tokyo): Jan. 2025 – Apr. 2025
- Jubayer Matin (Tokyo Tech): Jan. 2023 – Feb. 2023
- [Tomohito Amano](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=xIjuCKQAAAAJ) (Univ. of Tokyo): Jan. 2023
- [Kenichi Cho](https://sites.google.com/view/kenichi-chos-homepage/) (Kyoto Univ.): Oct. 2022
- [Ryota Masuki](https://r-masuki.github.io/r-masuki/) (Univ. of Tokyo): Aug. 2021 – Feb. 2022
- [Xinyi He](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=dVbcOV0AAAAJ&hl=ja) (Tokyo Tech): Oct. 2020 – Dec. 2020, Jun. 2021 – Aug. 2021
- [Hitoshi Mori](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=F_fn9V0AAAAJ&hl=en) (Osaka Univ.): Aug. 2020 – Sep. 2020

## Links

- [Spin Theory Group, NIMS](https://www.nims.go.jp/group/spintheory/)
- [Center for Materials Research by Information Integration (CMSM), NIMS](https://www.nims.go.jp/mmu/index.html)
- [ALAMODE — anharmonic lattice dynamics software](https://github.com/ttadano/alamode)
